title: XcodeGen Project Spec
description: Schema for XcodeGen project specification files

path.description: The path to the included file

relativePaths.description: Whether the included spec specifies paths relative to itself (default) or the root spec file

enable.description: Whether the specified spec should be included. Can be specified by environment variable

include.description: One or more paths to other specs. Used to split project spec into multiple files for easier structuring or sharing

createIntermediateGroups.description: If true, intermediate groups will be created for every path component

generateEmptyDirectories.description: Generate empty directories in the project

options.description: Various options to override default behaviour

minimumXcodeGenVersion.description: The minimum version of XcodeGen required

carthageBuildPath.description: Path to the Carthage build directory. Defaults to Carthage/Build

carthageExecutablePath.description: Path to the carthage executable. Defaults to carthage

createIntermediateGroups.description: If true, intermediate groups will be created for every path component between the folder containing the source and next existing group

bundleIdPrefix.description: Targets without PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER get autogenerated one: bundleIdPrefix.targetName

settingPresets.description: Controls settings automatically applied. all: project and target; project: only project; targets: only targets; none: no settings

developmentLanguage.description: Sets the development language of the project. Defaults to en

xcodeVersion.description: The version of Xcode. Format: 0910 or 9.1

deploymentTarget.description: Project-wide deployment target per platform (e.g. iOS: 9.0)

transitivelyLinkDependencies.description: If true, targets link to dependencies of their target dependencies. Defaults to false

groupSortPosition.description: Where groups are sorted: none=alphabetically; top=before files; bottom=after files (default)

generateEmptyDirectories.description: If true, empty directories will be added to project. Defaults to false

schemePathPrefix.description: Path prefix for relative paths in schemes (e.g. StoreKitConfiguration). Default ../../ for non-workspace; use ../ for workspaces

usesTabs.description: Override user's setting for tabs vs spaces in the project

indentWidth.description: Override user's setting for indent width in number of spaces

tabWidth.description: Override user's setting for tab width in number of spaces

disabledValidations.description: Validations to disable: missingConfigs, missingConfigFiles, missingTestPlans

defaultConfig.description: Default configuration for command line builds. If not set, first config alphabetically is chosen

pattern.description: Group name pattern (regex). Omit for main group

groupOrdering.description: Order of groups in the project

findCarthageFrameworks.description: When true, all individual frameworks for Carthage dependencies are automatically found. Defaults to false

localPackagesGroup.description: Group name for local packages. Defaults to Packages. Use empty string for project root

file.description: Whether this extension should be treated like a file. Defaults to true

attributes.description: Additional settings attributes for build files

resourceTags.description: On Demand Resource Tags for resources

fileTypes.description: Default file options for specific extensions across the project

preGenCommand.description: Bash command to run before project generation. Won't run if project unchanged due to cache

postGenCommand.description: Bash command to run after project generation (e.g. pod install). Won't run if project unchanged due to cache

useBaseInternationalization.description: If false and no Base.lproj resources, Base won't be in known regions. Defaults to true

defaultSourceDirectoryType.description: Type for directory sources when not specified: group (default), folder, or syncedFolder (Xcode 16)

attributes.description: PBXProject attributes. Advanced use. LastUpgradeCheck defaults to xcodeVersion if not set

type.description: Breakpoint type: File, Exception, SwiftError, OpenGLError, Symbolic, IDEConstraintError, IDETestFailure, RuntimeIssue

enabled.description: Whether breakpoint is active. Default true

ignoreCount.description: Times to ignore before stopping. Default 0

continueAfterRunningActions.description: Continue after evaluating actions. Default false

stopOnStyle.description: Stop on throw or catch. Default throw

actions.description: Breakpoint actions: DebuggerCommand, Log, ShellCommand, GraphicsTrace, AppleScript, Sound

breakpoints.description: Add shared breakpoints to the generated project

configs.description: Project build configurations. Values 'debug' and 'release' apply default build settings; other values (e.g. 'none') apply no defaults.

settingGroups.description: Named groups of Build Settings that can be reused elsewhere via settings.groups

targets.description: The list of targets in the project mapped by name

fileGroups.description: Paths to add to project root. Not included in targets (e.g. xcconfig folder, README)

schemes.description: Schemes by name. Allows more control than target scheme

schemeTemplates.description: Scheme templates referenced via scheme templates property. Use to extract common scheme settings

targetTemplates.description: Target templates referenced via target templates property. Use to extract common target settings

packages.description: Map of Swift packages by name. Linked to targets via dependency package:

projectReferences.description: Map of project references by name. Reference targets via ProjectName/TargetName

Target.description: Target configuration. Product type and platform are required

name.description: Override target name when using include/templates

type.description: Product type providing default build settings

platform.description: Platform providing default build settings. Use auto with supportedDestinations. Array for multi-platform targets

supportedDestinations.description: Supported platform destinations: iOS, tvOS, macOS, macCatalyst, visionOS, watchOS

deploymentTarget.description: Deployment target (e.g. 9.2). Object for per-platform values in multi-platform targets

sources.description: Source directories. String or list of paths/TargetSource objects

dependencies.description: Dependencies: target, framework, carthage, sdk, package, or bundle

info.description: Generates Info.plist at path. Auto-generates CFBundleIdentifier, CFBundleName, etc.

entitlements.description: Generates .entitlements file. Sets CODE_SIGN_ENTITLEMENTS. All properties must be provided

buildToolPlugins.description: Build tool plugins that run automatically during the build

preBuildScripts.description: Scripts that run before any other build phases

postBuildScripts.description: Scripts that run after any other build phases

preCompileScripts.description: Scripts that run before Compile Sources phase

postCompileScripts.description: Scripts that run after Compile Sources phase

scheme.description: Generated scheme with tests or config variants

legacy.description: Opt-in to Xcode External Build System legacy target

templates.description: Target template names to merge with. ${target_name} replaced in templates

transitivelyLinkDependencies.description: Override project option. If true, link to dependencies of target dependencies

directlyEmbedCarthageDependencies.description: If true, embed Carthage frameworks via Embed Frameworks phase instead of copy-frameworks script. Default true except iOS/tvOS/watchOS apps

requiresObjCLinking.description: If true, targets linking to this get -ObjC in OTHER_LDFLAGS. Required for static libs with ObjC categories. Default true for library.static

onlyCopyFilesOnInstall.description: If true, Embed Frameworks/Extensions phases have Copy only when installing checked. Default false

putResourcesBeforeSourcesBuildPhase.description: If true, Copy Resources runs before Compile Sources

TargetSource.description: Source file or directory with optional filters and build phase overrides

path.description: Path to the source file or directory

name.description: Override name. Default: last path component

group.description: Override parent group. Use / for multiple groups

excludes.description: Glob patterns to exclude. Relative to path. Supports **

includes.description: Glob patterns to include. Excludes override if both match

compilerFlags.description: Compiler flags for files under this path

type.description: file=file ref; group=group with files (default); folder=folder ref; syncedFolder=Xcode 16 buildable folder

destinationFilters.description: Platform destinations for these files. Default: all

inferDestinationFiltersByPath.description: Filter by path patterns like **/iOS/* or *_iOS.swift. Ignored if destinationFilters set

optional.description: Disable missing path check. Default false

buildPhase.description: Build phase: sources, resources, headers, none, or copyFiles with destination

attributes.description: Additional settings attributes for build files

resourceTags.description: On Demand Resource Tags for resources

BuildScript.description: Run script build phase. Either path or script required

path.description: Relative or absolute path to shell script

name.description: Script name. Defaults to Run Script

showEnvVars.description: Print env vars to build log. Defaults to true

basedOnDependencyAnalysis.description: Skip script if inputs/outputs unchanged. Defaults to true

runOnlyWhenInstalling.description: Only run when installing (runOnlyForDeploymentPostprocessing). Default false

BuildRule.description: Custom build rule. filePattern or fileType required; script or compilerSpec required

name.description: Build rule name. Defaults to Build Rule

script.description: Script to run on each file

runOncePerArchitecture.description: Run once per architecture. Defaults to true

TargetScheme.description: Convenience for auto-generating schemes from config variants or tests

configVariants.description: Generates a scheme per entry using configs with name + debug/release variants

testTargets.description: Test targets to include in scheme (build + test entries)

disableMainThreadChecker.description: Disable Main Thread Checker. Default false

stopOnEveryMainThreadCheckerIssue.description: Stop at every Main Thread Checker issue. Default false

disableThreadPerformanceChecker.description: Disable Thread Performance Checker. Default false

orderHint.description: Used by Xcode to sort schemes

isShown.description: Whether scheme is shown in scheme list

toolPath.description: Path to the build tool used in the legacy target

arguments.description: Build arguments used for the build tool

passSettings.description: Whether to pass build settings down to the build tool

workingDirectory.description: Working directory under which the build tool will be invoked

Scheme.description: Scheme with build, run, test, profile, analyze, archive actions

templates.description: Scheme template names. ${scheme_name} replaced in templates

orderHint.description: Used by Xcode to sort schemes

isShown.description: Whether scheme is shown in scheme list

Build.description: Build action: targets to build and which build types (run, test, profile, analyze, archive)

parallelizeBuild.description: Build targets in parallel. Default true

runPostActionsOnFailure.description: Whether to run post scripts even if build fails

ExecutionAction.description: Script run before/after build action via preActions/postActions

name.description: Script name. Defaults to Run Script

target.description: Build/test target whose settings become env vars (settingsTarget)

executable.description: Target to launch. Default: first runnable build target

TestPlan.description: Reference to xctestplan. Must be created in Xcode and checked in

defaultPlan.description: Whether this is the default plan. Default false

revealArchiveInOrganizer.description: Reveal archive in Xcode Organizer after build

CommonBuildAction.description: Options shared by run, test, profile, analyze, archive actions

config.description: Build config to use. debug for run/test/analyze; release for profile/archive

isEnabled.description: Whether variable is enabled. Default true

RemotePackage.description: Swift package from URL. Version: from, exactVersion, branch, revision, etc.

github.description: Shortcut: org/repo instead of full URL

LocalPackage.description: Swift package from local path. Directory must contain Package.swift

group.description: Group location in Xcode project. Empty string for project root

excludeFromProject.description: Exclude from generated project (e.g. when added via xcworkspace). Default false

ProjectReference.description: Reference to another xcodeproj. Reference targets via ProjectName/TargetName

base.description: Base build settings applied to all configurations

Settings.description: Build settings that can include base settings and per-configuration settings
